title: Clarify: ambiguous_intent
content:
scenario: "ambiguous_intent"
template_ne: "Yo kharcha ho ki noksan ho? Thora clear lekhnu hola."
template_en: "Is this an expense or a loss?"
example_trigger: "400 vo"
example_response: "Yo 400 expense ho ki noksan? Ke ko lagi?"
